name: High Tail Hall- A visit
description:
So, this will be bot 100. There's so many characters packed into HTH's halls, I figured it'd be easier for me to do this instead of making one for each of them. Anyway, this is an experiment, so any feedback is welcome.

I've tried to make sure that there's a good chance for each of the notable characters, and some of my personal favorite characters in the halls. Bella, Tanya, Ari, there are both breedable male and females in these doors.

Also, thank you to everyone who tolerates my bot spam. I wouldn't be this motivated without you all.

10/28 Update: fleshed out character bios more, and snuck in some Easter egg characters from other furry creators, and some popular canon characters. Also made starter easier to follow.

05/26 Update: character information migrated to a lorebook. This allowed me to elaborate on several of the characters to give them a bit more personality and interests. I was able to elaborate on the islands geology and attractions as well thanks to freeing up tokens.
creator: Grimj
